mapper.select:
/* CustMngMapper.custMngListEx2 */ SELECT A.PRMT_ID , E.PRMT_NM , A.CONTRACT_NUM , A.SUB_LINK_NAME /* 고객명 */ , A.SUBSCRIBER_NO /* 전화번호 */ , A.MNG_NM /* 받는분이름 */ , A.MNG_NM AS MASK_MNG_NM /* 받는분이름 */ , A.TEL_FN1 , A.TEL_MN1 , A.TEL_RN1 , A.TEL_FN1 || '-' || TEL_MN1 || '-' || TEL_RN1 AS TEL1 , A.TEL_FN2 , A.TEL_MN2 , A.TEL_RN2 , A.TEL_FN2 || '-' || TEL_MN2 || '-' || TEL_RN2 AS TEL2 , A.POST , A.ADDR , A.ADDR_BJD , A.ADDR_DTL , A.ADDR_DTL AS MASK_ADDR_DTL
, D.PRDT_NM , C.QUANTITY , C.QUANTITY * D.OUT_UNIT_PRIC AS SUM_AMOUNT
, E.AMOUNT_LIMIT /* 제한금액 */
, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(B.REQ_IN_DAY,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') REQ_IN_DAY /* 신청일 */
, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(SUB.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE,'YYYYMMDD'),'YYYY-MM-DD') LST_COM_ACTV_DATE /* 개통일 */
, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.GIFT_REGST_DATE,'YYYYMMDD'),'YYYY-MM-DD') GIFT_REGST_DATE /* 사은품 신청일 */
, B.FST_RATE_CD /* 고객 최초 요금제 */ , B.FST_RATE_NM /* 고객 최초 요금제명 */
, B.LST_RATE_NM /* 현재요금제명 */
, A.SMS_SEND_DATE /* 문자 전송일 */
, A.REGST_ID , A.REGST_DTTM , A.RVISN_ID , A.RVISN_DTTM , FN_GET_CODENM('ORG1010', E.PRMT_TYPE) AS PRMT_TYPE_NM , E.CHOICE_LIMIT , FN_GET_ORGNM(SUB.OPEN_AGNT_CD) AS OPEN_AGNT_NM , FN_GET_ORGNM(PUM.ORGN_ID) AS FST_USIM_ORG_NM , (SELECT MAX(TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(EFFECTIVE_DATE,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')) FROM MSP_JUO_FEATURE_INFO WHERE SERVICE_TYPE = 'P' AND SOC = B.LST_RATE_CD AND CONTRACT_NUM = A.CONTRACT_NUM) AS LST_RATE_DT , (SELECT CD_DSC FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'MSP0003' AND CD_VAL = SUB.SUB_STATUS) AS SUB_STATUS_NM FROM MSP_GIFT_PRMT_CUSTOMER A ,MSP_REQUEST_DTL B ,MSP_GIFT_PRMT_RESULT C ,MSP_GIFT_PRDT D ,MSP_GIFT_PRMT E ,MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO SUB ,MSP_PARTNER_USIM_MST PUM WHERE A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = C.CONTRACT_NUM(+) AND A.PRMT_ID = C.PRMT_ID(+) AND D.PRDT_ID(+) = C.PRDT_ID AND D.USE_YN(+) = 'Y' AND A.PRMT_ID = E.PRMT_ID AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = SUB.CONTRACT_NUM AND B.FST_USIM_NO = PUM.USIM_NO(+)
AND B.REQ_IN_DAY BETWEEN #{frDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}||'000000' AND #{toDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}||'235959'
AND E.PRMT_NM LIKE '%' || #{searchTxt, jdbcType=VARCHAR} || '%'
AND E.PRMT_ID = #{searchTxt, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
AND D.PRDT_NM LIKE '%' || #{searchTxt, jdbcType=VARCHAR} || '%'
AND D.PRDT_ID = #{searchTxt, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = #{searchTxt, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
AND A.SUB_LINK_NAME LIKE '%' || #{searchTxt, jdbcType=VARCHAR} || '%'
AND A.SUBSCRIBER_NO = #{searchTxt, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
ORDER BY 1

/* PromotionMapper.getCustGiftList */ SELECT B.PRDT_ID , B.PRDT_NM , 'N' AS dupYn , B.OUT_UNIT_PRIC , NVL(A.QUANTITY,'0') AS quantity , B.OUT_UNIT_PRIC * NVL(A.QUANTITY,'0') AS TOTAL , B.MAKER FROM MSP_GIFT_PRMT_RESULT A , MSP_GIFT_PRDT B WHERE A.PRMT_ID = #{prmtId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND B.USE_YN = 'Y' AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND B.PRDT_ID = A.PRDT_ID
ORDER BY B.PRDT_NM

/* PromotionMapper.getCustGiftPrmtPrdtList */ SELECT DECODE(A.PRDT_ID, NULL, '0', '1') AS row_Check , B.PRDT_ID , B.PRDT_NM , 'N' AS dup_Yn , B.OUT_UNIT_PRIC , NVL(A.QUANTITY,'0') AS quantity FROM MSP_GIFT_PRMT_RESULT A , MSP_GIFT_PRDT B , MSP_GIFT_PRMT_PRDT C WHERE C.PRMT_ID = #{prmtId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND B.USE_YN = 'Y' AND B.PRDT_ID = C.PRDT_ID
AND A.CONTRACT_NUM(+) = #{contractNum, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND C.PRMT_ID = A.PRMT_ID(+) AND C.PRDT_ID = A.PRDT_ID(+) ORDER BY row_Check DESC, PRDT_NM

SELECT PM.PRMT_ID , PM.PRMT_NM , PM.PRMT_TYPE , PM.CHOICE_LIMIT , FN_GET_CODENM('ORG1010', PM.PRMT_TYPE) AS PRMT_TYPE_NM , PD.PRDT_NM , PMR.QUANTITY , DECODE(PMR.PRDT_ID, NULL, '0', '1') AS ROW_CHECK , PMPD.SORT FROM MSP_GIFT_PRMT PM INNER JOIN MSP_GIFT_PRMT_PRDT PMPD ON PM.PRMT_ID = PMPD.PRMT_ID INNER JOIN MSP_GIFT_PRDT PD ON PD.PRDT_ID = PMPD.PRDT_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN MSP_GIFT_PRMT_CUSTOMER CUS ON CUS.PRMT_ID = PM.PRMT_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN MSP_REQUEST_DTL REQ ON REQ.CONTRACT_NUM = CUS.CONTRACT_NUM LEFT OUTER JOIN MSP_GIFT_PRMT_RESULT PMR ON PMR.PRMT_ID = CUS.PRMT_ID AND PMR.CONTRACT_NUM = CUS.CONTRACT_NUM AND PMR.PRDT_ID = PD.PRDT_ID WHERE REQ.REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey} ORDER BY PM.PRMT_ID, PMPD.SORT, PD.PRDT_NM

SELECT PM.PRMT_ID , PM.PRMT_NM , PM.PRMT_TYPE , PM.CHOICE_LIMIT , FN_GET_CODENM('ORG1010', PM.PRMT_TYPE) AS PRMT_TYPE_NM , PD.PRDT_NM , MPRT.QNTY AS QUANTITY , DECODE(MPRT.PROM_CD, NULL, '0', '1') AS ROW_CHECK , PMPD.SORT FROM MSP_GIFT_PRMT PM INNER JOIN MSP_GIFT_PRMT_PRDT PMPD ON PM.PRMT_ID = PMPD.PRMT_ID INNER JOIN MSP_GIFT_PRDT PD ON PD.PRDT_ID = PMPD.PRDT_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN NMCP_GIFT_REQ_TXN@DL_MCP MPRT ON MPRT.REQ_KEY = #{requestKey} AND MPRT.PROM_CD = PM.PRMT_ID AND MPRT.GIFT_CD = PD.PRDT_ID WHERE PM.PRMT_ID IN (SELECT MPRT.PROM_CD FROM NMCP_GIFT_REQ_TXN@DL_MCP MPRT WHERE MPRT.REQ_KEY = #{requestKey}) ORDER BY PM.PRMT_ID, PMPD.SORT, PD.PRDT_NM
